name: Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>亡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヴェイドス
desc: During the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in a Field Zone; Special Summon this card to your opponent's field, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can add to your hand or Set 1 "Ashened" Continuous Trap from your Deck. If this card is sent from your opponent's field to your GY: You can destroy all monsters on the field. You can only use each effect of "Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in a Field Zone; Special Summon this card to your opponent's field, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can add to your hand or Set 1 "Ashened" Continuous Trap from your Deck. If this card is sent from your opponent's field to your GY: You can destroy all monsters on the field. You can only use each effect of "Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase, if this card is in your hand (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card in a Field Zone; Special Summon this card to your opponent's field, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can add to your hand or Set 1 "Ashened" Continuous Trap from your Deck. If this card is sent from your opponent's field to your GY: You can destroy all monsters on the field. You can only use each effect of "Veidos the Eruption Dragon of Extinction" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
fmat: Veidos the Dragon of Endless Darkness
